subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-'Ali! Hearken unto the Call from the precincts of 'Akká - verily, He maketh mention of thee with a remembrance before which all remembrance hath bowed down, and turneth unto thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد ولی اسمع الندآء من شطر عکاء انه ذکرک بذکر خضعت له الاذکار و اقبل الیک
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prophecy and fulfillment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
